title: Quanton

{{Quote|The Imperial Security Bureau has developed many types of truth serums over the years. Bavo Six is a nasty one, and easy enough for Imperial chemists to produce. I had it used on me when I was captured on Quanton.|General Airen Cracken, ''Cracken's Rebel Field Guide''|<ref name="CRFG" />}}
'''Quanton''' was a terrestrial astronomical object<ref name="CRFG" /> located in the [[Quanton system/Legends|Quanton system]], a part of the [[Obtrexta sector/Legends|Obtrexta sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]] was captured by the<ref name="CRFG" /> [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]]<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|III|59|Quanton}}</ref> of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] on Quanton. Cracken was subsequently subjected to the [[Truth serum/Legends|truth serum]] [[Bavo Six]] and later mentioned both his capture and his experience with Bavo Six in the ''[[Cracken's Rebel Field Guide]]'', a [[Datafile/Legends|datafile]] he had [[Author/Legends|composed]] that documented various pieces of equipment utilized by Rebel Alliance agents.<ref name="CRFG" />

==Behind the scenes==
Quanton was first mentioned in the [[1991]] sourcebook [[Cracken's Rebel Field Guide (sourcebook)|''Cracken's Rebel Field Guide'']], which was written by [[Christopher Kubasik]] for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="CRFG" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Quanton [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the celestial body itself, in grid square K-4.<ref name="TEA" />
